chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRAs 381 & 382 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.250/2018 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant These reference applications are pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 07.09.2020, following order was passed: “Learned counsel requests for time to examine as to whether instant Reference has filed within the period of limitation or otherwise. Adjourned as requested”. Today learned counsel merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
